description: Create the /admin/download page with QR code, install instructions per platform, copy/share buttons, and 'Cara Install' section - matching IMS-style layout
steps: Install qrcode.react package (npm install qrcode.react) for generating QR codes as React components
Create src/app/admin/download/page.js as a 'use client' component with the following layout sections:
- Page header: 'Download Aplikasi CV Portal' with subtitle
- Left column: QR Code (large, ~200px) generated from URL 'https://cv-portal-six.vercel.app' using qrcode.react, with the URL text displayed below it

- Right column: Install instructions with tabs/sections for Android, iOS, Windows, macOS. Each with step-by-step numbered instructions specific to that platform (e.g., Android: Chrome > menu > 'Add to Home screen'; iOS: Safari > Share > 'Add to Home Screen'; Windows: Chrome > menu > 'Install CV Portal'; macOS: Chrome > menu > 'Install CV Portal')
- Bottom section: Share buttons row with 'Copy Link' button (copies URL to clipboard with toast feedback) and 'Share via WhatsApp' button (opens wa.me link with pre-filled message)
- 'Cara Install' section/card: Explain PWA benefits - 'Aplikasi muncul di home screen / desktop seperti app native. Bisa dibuka tanpa browser. Akses lebih cepat dan mendukung notifikasi.'
- Include Install App button that triggers the browser's native PWA install prompt (using beforeinstallprompt event) with fallback text if not available
Style the page using existing Tailwind patterns (card class, rounded-xl, shadow-md) to match the rest of the admin UI. Use blue-600 as primary color.
Add a link to the download page in src/components/Navbar.js - add 'Download App' link visible to admin role users, placed near the Settings link
Verify: run npm run build and confirm no errors
acceptance_criteria: src/app/admin/download/page.js exists with QR code, platform install instructions, share buttons, and Cara Install section
Install instructions cover Android, iOS, Windows, and macOS with platform-specific steps
Copy Link button copies the app URL to clipboard
Share via WhatsApp button opens WhatsApp share with app URL
Page includes the exact note text: 'Aplikasi muncul di home screen / desktop seperti app native. Bisa dibuka tanpa browser. Akses lebih cepat dan mendukung notifikasi.'
Navbar.js includes a 'Download App' link for admin users
npm run build completes without errors
verification: Run 'npm run build' in /projects/sandbox/cv-portal and confirm exit code 0
